# programs.nix-required-mounts

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.nix-required-mounts`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.nix-required-mounts.allowedPatterns` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | The hook config, describing which paths to mount for which system features |
| `programs.nix-required-mounts.allowedPatterns.<name>.onFeatures` | `list of string` | Which requiredSystemFeatures should trigger relaxation of the sandbox |
| `programs.nix-required-mounts.allowedPatterns.<name>.paths` | `list of (absolute path or (submodule))` | A list of glob patterns, indicating which paths to expose to the sandbox |
| `programs.nix-required-mounts.allowedPatterns.<name>.safePrefixes` | `list of absolute path` | A list of path prefixes that do not need and shall not be searched recursively for further symlink targets. Everything in the nix store does not need to be searched as the derivation already calculcated the full closure of all nix store paths for the drivers package. |
| `programs.nix-required-mounts.allowedPatterns.<name>.unsafeFollowSymlinks` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Instructs the hook to mount the symlink targets as well, when any of the `paths` contain symlinks. This may not work correctly with glob patterns. . |
| `programs.nix-required-mounts.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Expose extra paths to the sandbox depending on derivations' requiredSystemFeatures. |
| `programs.nix-required-mounts.extraWrapperArgs` | `list of string` | List of extra arguments (such as `--add-flags -v`) to pass to the hook's wrapper |
| `programs.nix-required-mounts.presets.nvidia-gpu.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Declare the support for derivations that require an Nvidia GPU to be available, e.g. derivations with `requiredSystemFeatures = [ "cuda" ]`. This mounts the corresponding userspace drivers and device nodes in the sandbox, but only for derivations that request these special features. You may extend or override the exposed paths via the `programs.nix-required-mounts.allowedPatterns.nvidia-gpu.paths` option. . |
| `programs.nix-required-mounts.presets.zluda.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Same as `programs.nix-required-mounts.presets.nvidia-gpu` but adds paths to the sandbox that are needed for running CUDA applications on top of the ZLUDA translation layer combined with AMD GPUs. You may extend or override the exposed paths via the `programs.nix-required-mounts.allowedPatterns.zluda.paths` option. . |
